sheets.name: README
rows: Validation, QA, and Test Case Specification
Defines synthetic profiles, expected outputs, validation checks, data integrity tests, and build acceptance criteria.
Generate weekly meal classes before dish recommendations.
Keep primary family meals separate from member-specific add-ons.
Join dish pools by meal_class_code only.
Do not invent IDs in application code; use governance docs for changes.

sheets.name: QA_Checks_v3
rows: Weekly primary/secondary/tertiary classes are MAIN_PRIMARY only
Dependent/lifecycle legacy classes moved out of main plan
13 legacy add-on/template classes marked not primary
Add-on component plan populated only for relevant personas
7992 add-on rows across dependent/health/cook overlay personas
Class-dish examples join from primary class only
weekly examples generated with examples_for(primary_class_code); exhaustive list in Class_Dish_Options_v3

sheets.name: Synthetic_Test_Cases
rows: MP-origin vegetarian family in Mumbai with infant and diabetic elder
MP home-style base, Mumbai lifestyle overlay, infant add-on, diabetic add-on, no non-veg.
Gujarat Jain family with school child
Jain constraints, child/tiffin add-ons only Jain-compatible, no onion/garlic/root veg.
Fish classes appear at realistic cadence if non-veg allowed.
Kerala coastal omnivore family in Bengaluru
Kerala rice/fish/dosa/appam home base plus Bengaluru lifestyle overlay.
Heavier classes allowed; coherence not over-forced.
Elderly couple with soft food need
Soft/digestive classes may be primary because majority household is elderly.
Quick/assembly/low-cook weekday classes; weekend optional special.
Family with toddler plus spicy regional food
Family primary meal remains; toddler mild add-on generated when needed.
Paneer dishes excluded; class can still offer non-paneer alternatives if class remains valid.
Minimal onboarding: only state and veg
Cold-start state veg baseline generated; confidence low.
Class code in plan not in taxonomy
Vegetarian household with non-veg state intensity high
No non-veg appears; state non-veg intensity ignored by hard diet.
Family primary meals remain; postpartum add-on generated for target member.
Tamil home classes remain with Delhi urban overlay.

sheets.name: Automated_Validation_Checks
rows: All plan class codes exist in Meal_Class_Master_v3.
Class-to-dish expansion returns only dishes from same class.
Add-on dishes return only from addon class pool.
Each generated week has 7 days and expected meal slots.
No add-on-only class appears as primary.
Current city overlay does not erase home-state base.
Fixed random seed gives repeatable output.
Every addon target member exists in household profile.
Diet mode missing blocks dish expansion but not class preview.

sheets.name: Build_Acceptance
rows: All seed data imports; row counts match source; FK checks pass.
Onboarding produces normalized household profile for all main paths.
Persona assignment covers base and overlap personas with confidence.
Weekly class plan generated for synthetic profiles.
Dish candidates are eligible and ranked.
Feedback changes future scoring without hard constraint violations.
APIs return schema-valid responses and errors.
Admin changes require QA and versioning.
Analytics capture and dashboards validate quality.

sheets.name: Edge_Cases
rows: No eligible dish candidates after hard filters
Return class-level plan with safe fallback flag and admin data gap alert.
Prompt to review Never list; do not violate Never list.
Use home state and tier/default city proxy.
Generate multiple add-ons and deduplicate where appropriate.
Fasting mode overrides weekend indulgence for fasting member/household.
